creator: mharo@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

If you use the proftpd.sh script provided with the port, it creates  
/var/run/proftpd during the boot process, as long as you enable the script. 
(rename it to proftpd.sh from proftpd.sh.sample) 

Let me know if I may close this problem report. 

Michael
